title: Boss Lab: Three simultaneous production failures
scenario: ALERT: three teams are reporting failures simultaneously. (1) The `api` Deployment pods are being killed and restarted — a liveness probe typo (`/heathz`) is causing them to be considered unhealthy. (2) The `worker` Deployment needs 2 replicas each requesting 2000m CPU, but nodes only have 2000m allocatable total — both pods are Pending. (3) The `logger` DaemonSet is missing a toleration for node `sim-node-1` which has taint `env=prod:NoSchedule` — one of the two expected pods is not scheduled. Fix all three.
starterYaml:
# Fix 1: api Deployment — liveness probe path typo
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: nginx:1.25
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /heathz
            port: 80
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 10
---
# Fix 2: worker Deployment — CPU requests too high
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: alpine:3.18
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "while true; do echo working; sleep 5; done"]
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "2000m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "2000m"
            memory: "512Mi"
---
# Fix 3: logger DaemonSet — missing toleration for taint env=prod:NoSchedule
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logger
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logger
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logger
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: logger
        image: alpine:3.18
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "while true; do echo logging; sleep 5; done"]

objectives.description: `api` pods are Running and not restarting
`worker` container CPU request is `800m` or less
`logger` DaemonSet has toleration for key `env`, value `prod`, effect `NoSchedule`

hints.text: Start with the easiest fix: `api` liveness probe. Change `path: /heathz` to `path: /healthz`. Apply just the api Deployment first.
For `worker`: 2 replicas × 2000m = 4000m needed but only 4000m total and system pods also consume CPU. Reduce requests to 600m — well within each node's budget.
For `logger`: sim-node-1 has taint `env=prod:NoSchedule`. Add a toleration block under `spec.template.spec.tolerations` with key `env`, value `prod`, operator `Equal`, effect `NoSchedule`.
Apply all three fixes in one `kubectl apply -f` call with the multi-document YAML (three `---` separated manifests). Then verify: `kubectl get pods` should show all pods Running or Succeeded.

solution:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: nginx:1.25
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 80
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 10
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: alpine:3.18
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "while true; do echo working; sleep 5; done"]
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "600m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "1000m"
            memory: "512Mi"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logger
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logger
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logger
    spec:
      tolerations:
      - key: env
        operator: Equal
        value: prod
        effect: NoSchedule
      containers:
      - name: logger
        image: alpine:3.18
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "while true; do echo logging; sleep 5; done"]
